{"action":"opened","number":2870,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tardis-sn/tardis/pulls/2870","id":2158777611,"node_id":"PR_kwDOACzVns6ArFUL","html_url":"https://github.com/tardis-sn/tardis/pull/2870","diff_url":"https://github.com/tardis-sn/tardis/pull/2870.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/tardis-sn/tardis/pull/2870.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/tardis-sn/tardis/issues/2870","number":2870,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"Replace M_PI=np.arccos(-1) with M_PI=np.pi","user":{"login":"Akash265","id":98255073,"node_id":"U_kgDOBdtA4Q","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/98255073?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265","html_url":"https://github.com/Akash265","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Akash265/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"### :pencil: Description

**Type:** :beetle: `bugfix`

This pull request addresses the inconsistent usage of the constant for π (pi) in the code. The previously assigned variable `M_PI` was defined as `np.arccos(-1)`. This has now been replaced with `M_PI=np.pi`, which is a more straightforward and standardized way to reference the value of π using NumPy's built-in constant.

This change improves code readability and consistency, ensuring that we use `np.pi` across the codebase instead of redefining π in different ways. 

This PR resolves issue #2863 regarding the inconsistent definition of π.

### :pushpin: Resources

- [NumPy Documentation: Constants](https://numpy.org/doc/stable/reference/constants.html#numpy.pi)

### :vertical_traffic_light: Testing

How did you test these changes?

- [x] Testing pipeline
- [ ] Other method (describe)
- [ ] My changes can't be tested (explain why)

I ran the testing pipeline, and all tests passed successfully, confirming that the change does not introduce any issues.

### :ballot_box_with_check: Checklist

- [ ] I requested two reviewers for this pull request
- [ ] I updated the documentation according to my changes
- [ ] I built the documentation by applying the `build_docs` label

> **Note:** If you are not allowed to perform any of these actions, ping (@) a contributor.
